case_title: MARICHRIST BENITEZ VS. SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLDING et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BENITEZ, MARICHRIST AS TO DEFENDANT SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLDING RMC PAINTING & RESTORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENITEZ, MARICHRIST AS TO DEFENDANT RMC PAINTING & RESTORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENITEZ, MARICHRIST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLDING RMC PAINTING & RESTORATION $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $120.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST RMC PAINTING AND RESTORATION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JUN-20-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SAFETY SERVICE SCAFFOLDING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2012 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (25 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BENITEZ, MARICHRIST

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT SAFETY ETC WAS REPRESENTED BY PETER PEARSON. DEFENDANT RMC PAINTING ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT MAUSCHKE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
